reviewing.ea_instance: 1 (Stage 3 EA chain instance 1; the LA's colloquial "EA-7" matches the Guide-#7 numbering and is interchangeable in chat narrative)

guide_review_response.summary:
Stage 3 EA instance 1 emits a clean iteration-1 comprehension gate. All 13 V0 checks PASS or PASS-WITH-NOTE; the single PASS-WITH-NOTE flagged as HIGH/blocking (OQ-1 devplatform HEAD drift) is demonstrably STATUS-staleness per Guide-#7 operating rule 5b(a), NOT procedure breakage per 5b(b). EA-1's STOP-and-report discipline is exactly correct: rather than autonomously rewriting expected baselines or silently absorbing the drift, EA-1 paused, framed three disposition options, and surfaced the question with explicit Guide arbitration request. This is the discipline reminder w11 was written to maintain across the Stage 2 to Stage 3 EA chain transition; EA-1 inherits EA-6's structural-axis quality without inheriting EA-6's narrative-paraphrase pattern.
The 61-ack verbatim restatement (38 v4-era + 4 g6-ea5 + 10 g6-ea6 + 9 g7-ea1) is complete. Phantom i1-5/6/7 rejection narrative is present. f1 treated as separate ID per Guide-#5 v4 quality review D2 default disposition (38 v4-era count, not 37). Stage 3 hard invariants correctly locked at: BlarAI-untouched-except-3.10-STATUS-append; single substantive devplatform commit at 3.9; fleet stays paused; stash@{0} untouched; no merge to main.
Disposition of all 4 open questions: - OQ-1 (V0i devplatform HEAD drift): AUTHORIZED disposition (a) per rule 5b(a). EA-1 acknowledges 3894221 as new Stage 3 entry baseline. STATUS.md "Active branch (devplatform)" line is stale; gets corrected at Stage 3.10 STATUS append per g7-ea1_n9 + new g7-ea1_n10 added below. - OQ-2 (BlarAI 2 untracked files): No-action; benign. LA may commit both files together as a single docs-only commit pre-PROCEED to clean working tree before Item 3.1 begins. Specific commit guidance below in `pre_proceed_la_action`. - OQ-3 (f1/g5-5 dedup; restated 38 by default): AFFIRM. EA-1 followed the canonical Guide-#5 v4 quality review D2 disposition ("1 f1 treated as separate ack"). 38 is correct. - OQ-4 (v4/v5 handoff commit history): AFFIRM informational; no action.
NEW ack g7-ea1_n10 added: STATUS.md "Active branch (devplatform)" line correction at Stage 3.10 (mirrors the Stage 2.10.1 N-correction pattern; small targeted edit, append region).
PROCEED authorization granted for Item 3.1. Standing reminders r1-r5 apply throughout Stage 3: r1 = preserve assignee variable name when copying; do NOT rename variables in the Copy-Item -Recurse flow. r2 = STOP and report on any pre-edit audit finding outside the documented Stage 3 scope (e.g., unexpected hardcoded BlarAI runtime path in a PS1 not in the G-1 5-script set). r3 = README.md examples and similar comment-only paths are out-of-scope for any Stage 3 verification (per Stage 2 r3 inheritance). r4 = forward-stage all Stage 3.10 STATUS append content as cumulative footnote items in EA-1 working notes (mirrors the Stage 2.10 cumulative-footnote pattern). r5 = at any clean breakpoint with even slightly tight context budget, emit Stage-3-mid-stage-handoff XML rather than push through (per dn15 + i1-4 + g6-ea6_n4 + g7-ea1_n8).

independent_disk_verification_of_ea_1_fi.intro: Per dn14 + dn20 + p3+p16: Guide-#7 trusts EA-1's V0a-V0M reports because EA-1 has operated honestly in iter-1 gate emission; spot-checks below verify the highest-stakes claims (OQ-1 + OQ-2) against disk.

check.output: 3894221 fix(registry): promote agent_gates_bus + architecture_decisions to fleet-level; annotate remaining auxiliaries pending Stage 6 review eaa005f Scaffold: initial devplatform skeleton (Stage 1)
check.metadata: commit 3894221a3a07c8edfc71b0cf1553bef3a508987a parent eaa005fcccf6da2884872ec7118bd03b6fc357af author Blair <mr.blair.do@gmail.com> [Lead Architect] date 2026-04-24 21:33:12 -0400 diff projects/registry.yaml | 25 +++++++++++++++++++++---- (+21 / -4)
check.classification: STATUS-staleness per rule 5b(a). Repo state is internally consistent: the registry edit at 3894221 IS the agent_gates_bus + architecture_decisions promotion + auxiliary annotation work documented in STATUS.md anomalies A8 (line 165-170), A9 (line 172-177), and A10 (line 179-184) under the "Stage 1 close + 1" Execution Log entry (line 99). STATUS.md line 35 "Active branch (devplatform) | main (HEAD eaa005f -- initial scaffold commit)" is the stale piece -- the HEAD has advanced one commit since Stage 1 close, and STATUS just hasn't caught up. The Stage 3 procedure is not affected: Stage 3 starts from devplatform main HEAD regardless of which specific HEAD commit it is, as long as the Stage 1 scaffold is present (verified by V0h Test-Path checks PASS) and the registry has the correct project IDs (verified by V0k Test-Path PASS + content shape consistent with STATUS Vikunja Project IDs section).
check.not_procedure_breakage_evidence: The 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml `<preconditions>` block does NOT specify a particular devplatform HEAD commit; it requires "devplatform scaffold exists from Stage 1" + "Fleet scheduled tasks remain Disabled". Both are TRUE at 3894221 (the scaffold from eaa005f is preserved in the parent chain; 3894221 only edits projects/registry.yaml). The registry.yaml at 3894221 contains the same project IDs (blarai=3, devplatform_meta=10, fleet_reports=8) that Stage 3 needs, plus the A8/A9/A10 promotions that are forward-progress, not regression.
check.ea_1_disposition_authorized: EA-1's option (a) -- acknowledge 3894221 as new Stage 3 entry baseline -- is AUTHORIZED. Stage 3 work proceeds from 3894221 unchanged; Stage 3 single commit at 3.9 will land on 3894221 as parent. The init pointer's expected V0i value (eaa005f) was inherited from STATUS.md's stale field; the init pointer is forward-correctable but does NOT need amendment per dn9/dn23 no-amend doctrine on committed audit artifacts (the init pointer itself is not yet committed -- per OQ-2 -- so even amendment would be permitted, but it's not necessary; this verdict file documents the disposition and the Stage 3.10 STATUS append per g7-ea1_n10 makes the canonical correction).

check.classification: Benign. Two untracked files: (a) 3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml -- Guide-#7-authored Stage 3 EA initialization pointer; emitted via Write tool by Guide-#7 at 2026-04-27; attached to the EA-1 chat by the LA at session spawn. Not yet committed because Guide-#7 emitted it as a working-tree artifact for LA to attach + commit at LA's cadence convenience. (b) 3.1-RESPONSE-EA_COMPREHENSION_GATE_ITERATION_1_STAGE3_INSTANCE_1.xml -- EA-1's iter-1 gate response file emitted per the EA-1 init pointer's required_first_actions §action_3 file-output discipline. Plus this Guide-#7 verdict file (3.1-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_STAGE3_EA_1.xml) is being authored at 2026-04-27 and is also a candidate for the same docs-only commit.
check.pre_proceed_la_action:
Before EA-1 begins Item 3.1 work, the LA SHOULD commit all 3 docs-only files together as a single chore commit on chore/platform-extraction (BlarAI side). This: - cleans the BlarAI working tree before Stage 3 substantive work begins (preserves the single-commit-discipline-by-default at devplatform 3.9 + g3-1 inheritance) - preserves the audit chain (init pointer + iter-1 gate + Guide-#7 verdict together in a coherent commit; mirrors the Stage 2 cycle pattern: Guide-#6 init pointer + EA-6 iter-1 gate + Guide-#6 verdict frequently committed together) - simplifies EA-1's V0c expected baseline for any subsequent V0 re-run Suggested commit: cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-RESPONSE-EA_COMPREHENSION_GATE_ITERATION_1_STAGE3_INSTANCE_1.xml git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_STAGE3_EA_1.xml git commit -m "docs(platform_separation): Stage 3 init pointer + EA-1 iter-1 gate + Guide-#7 verdict (APPROVED)" Per g6-ea6_n4 + i1-4 + g7-ea1_n8: this is a docs-only commit; exempt from the Stage 3 single-substantive-commit-at-3.9 rule. The substantive commit at 3.9 lands on devplatform main, not on BlarAI chore/platform-extraction; these are different repos.
ALTERNATIVELY: the LA may defer this commit until after EA-1 emits more Stage 3 work (e.g., bundle with mid-stage handoff if any, or with closing handoff) -- low impact either way. Recommendation: commit now for cleanest sequencing.

independent_disk_verification_of_ea_1_fi.check: EA-1 chose 38 v4-era count (treating f1 as separate from g5-5). This matches the canonical Guide-#5 v4 quality review D2 disposition at line 72 verbatim: "1 f1 (treated as separate ack)". The init pointer's `<ack_group label="f1">` `<intro>` explicitly stated: "Adding f1 separately here per disk reality; Stage 3 EA may treat as alias of g5-5 in iter-1 gate IF the LA confirms the conceptual-collapse interpretation (otherwise restate verbatim)." EA-1 correctly chose the default (separate). AUTHORIZED.

EA-1 noted v4 + v5 mid-stage handoff XML commit lineage as informational context. No action needed; this is audit-chain literacy that informs future mid-stage handoff emission discipline (per r5 above) but does not block Item 3.1 work.

EA-1 restated all 61 acks verbatim: - 38 v4-era (incl. the 5 Guide-#7 disk-corrected misses: g4-iter2-1, g4-iter2-2, g4-iter2-3, f1, dn15) - 4 g6-ea5 - 10 g6-ea6 - 9 g7-ea1 - 0 phantom (i1-5/6/7 explicitly rejected with reference to Guide-#5 v4 quality review D2 line 67) The phantom rejection narrative is present + correctly attributed. Per LA's "do not hallucinate" directive at 2026-04-27, EA-1 followed exactly. AUTHORIZED.

All 13 V0 checks (V0a through V0M) executed + reported with PASS / PASS-WITH-NOTE labels. EA-1's transparency on partial-pass cases (V0c init-pointer-untracked + V0i HEAD drift + V0l Vikunja running) is exemplary -- each surfaces the actual observed value vs expected with proposed disposition rather than silently absorbing.

EA-1 explicitly locked: BlarAI untouched (except 3.10 STATUS append); single substantive commit at devplatform 3.9; fleet stays paused; stash@{0} untouched; no merge to main. All match init pointer hard_invariants block + the 61-ack carry-forward enforcement set.

new_acknowledgment.ack:
STATUS.md "Active branch (devplatform)" line correction at Stage 3.10. The line at docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md line 35 currently reads: "| Active branch (devplatform) | `main` (HEAD `eaa005f` -- initial scaffold commit) |" This is stale: actual devplatform HEAD at Stage 3 entry is `3894221` (per Guide-#7 disk verification at OQ-1 above). EA-1 corrects at Stage 3.10 STATUS append: - Update line 35 to reflect: "main @ <Stage-3-3.9-commit-hash> (Stage 3 commit; parent 3894221; ancestor eaa005f Stage 1 scaffold)" - Append a brief Stage 3 Closure Footnote (in the Stage Ledger row + a new "Stage 3 Closure Footnotes" section if structurally analogous to Stage 2's pattern) documenting the corrected baseline narrative: "STATUS.md 'Active branch (devplatform)' line was stale at Stage 3 entry (recorded eaa005f from Stage 1.4 closure; actual HEAD at Stage 3 entry was 3894221 from LA's between-stages registry edit on 2026-04-24 promoting agent_gates_bus + architecture_decisions to fleet-level + annotating auxiliary projects per A8 + A9 + A10 anomalies). Disposition source: Guide-#7 review file docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_STAGE3_EA_1.xml. STATUS-staleness per Guide-#7 operating rule 5b(a); not procedure breakage." Status transitions to SATISFIED at 3.10 STATUS append landing.
This ack joins the cumulative Stage 3.10 STATUS append set: g7-ea1_n9 (Stage 3 closure entry) + g7-ea1_n10 (devplatform HEAD line correction) + ack-count correction footnote (per nature_of_this_file forward-correction at 2026-04-27).

required_acknowledgments.ack_to_emit_at_start_of_next_chat_turn: EA-1 acknowledges before Item 3.1 work begins: (a) OQ-1 disposition: 3894221 is the new Stage 3 entry baseline; STATUS-staleness on line 35 will be corrected at 3.10 per new ack g7-ea1_n10. (b) OQ-2 disposition: pre-PROCEED docs-only commit (3 files: init pointer + iter-1 gate + this Guide-#7 verdict) is recommended; EA-1 awaits LA's decision on commit timing (commit-now-pre-PROCEED OR defer-to-bundle-with-mid-stage). Either is procedurally acceptable. (c) OQ-3 disposition: 38 v4-era count CORRECT per default; no change. (d) OQ-4 disposition: informational; no action. (e) New ack g7-ea1_n10 added to FORWARD-ACTIVE set; binding through Stage 3.10 STATUS append. (f) Standing reminders r1-r5 acknowledged.

guide_review_response.proceed_authorization:
PROCEED -- EA-1 may begin Item 3.1 (Copy 7 platform tool directories + 2 chokepoint helpers from BlarAI/tools/ to devplatform/tools/) AFTER: (1) Acknowledging the OQ-1/OQ-2/OQ-3/OQ-4 dispositions + new ack g7-ea1_n10 + standing reminders r1-r5 in EA-1's next chat reply. (2) The LA's decision on pre-PROCEED docs-only commit (recommended; see OQ-2 disposition).
Stage 3 execution order (per init pointer + 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml): Item 3.1: Copy-Item -Recurse for 7 dirs (vikunja, vikunja_mcp, fleet_ops, fleet_observability, autonomy_budget, gate_stale_cleaner, scheduled-tasks) + 2 chokepoint helpers (_vikunja_client.py + _project_context.py). Do-not-copy: tools/openvino_contrib_agent/, BlarAI-specific tests. Item 3.1.v2: Test-Path verify all 6 v2-baseline files present per g7-ea1_n3. Item 3.2: Copy doctrine docs by pattern (CLAUDE_*, CO_LEAD_*, DEC*, DOMAIN*, CONTINUATION_PROMPT.md). Item 3.2.v2: Copy docs/governance/ + docs/scheduled/wake_templates/ per g7-ea1_n4. Item 3.3: Copy claude_cowork/ + claude_projects/ if populated. Item 3.4: Populate devplatform pyproject.toml from BlarAI minus runtime deps. Item 3.5: cd devplatform; pip install -e . (sanity verify + import check). Item 3.6: Copy MCP configs with `${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}` env-var pattern per g7-ea1_n1 (F-1 mitigation devplatform half). Item 3.7: Smoke test daily_digest --dry-run from devplatform per g7-ea1_n6 (BLARAI_PID preflight from BlarAI/.platform/vikunja_project_ids.yaml; expect 3). Item 3.8: Verify devplatform/docs/ does NOT contain BlarAI-only doc patterns per g7-ea1_n7. Item 3.9: Single Stage-3 commit on devplatform main per g7-ea1_n8. Parent: 3894221 (the LA's between-stages registry edit). Commit template per init pointer §work_plan_pointer §3.9 + g7-ea1_n8 verbatim. Item 3.10: Append-only STATUS.md update on BlarAI side per g7-ea1_n9 + g7-ea1_n10 + ack-count correction footnote. Item 3.10.v2: Write devplatform/.copy_manifest_v2.yaml per g7-ea1_n5.
Stop conditions during Stage 3 (unchanged from init pointer + standing reminders r1-r5): - Any Item-N verify clause fails -> STOP and report. - Any pre-edit audit surfaces a hardcoded BlarAI runtime path in a PS1 OUTSIDE the G-1 5-script set (per r2 + g4-iter2-2) -> STOP and report; default disposition no-action; runtime-path discovery requires LA scope-expansion approval. - $BLARAI_PID drift at Stage 3.7 -> STOP and report per g4-5; NO silent regex/yaml adaptation. - VIKUNJA_PASS literal slips into devplatform .mcp.json or .vscode/mcp.json -> STOP per g7-ea1_n1; refactor to env-var reference; NO commit with literal. - Any unexpected Stage 3.2 doctrine-doc pattern overshoot (BlarAI-only doc copied to devplatform/docs/) -> STOP per g7-ea1_n7; remove unintended copy; preserve BlarAI original. - Any Stage 3.8 BlarAI-only docs absence Select-String returns non-empty -> STOP. - Any Stage 3.9 commit produces more than ONE commit OR omits any expected file (manifest, MCP configs, doctrine docs, pyproject.toml) -> STOP per g7-ea1_n8; NO partial commits. - Any Stage 3.10 STATUS append modifies pre-existing sections (A1-A11, Stage Ledger Stages 0/1/2, Stage 2 Closure Footnotes, Recovery Anchors, Vikunja Project IDs, How to Resume, prior Execution Log entries) -> STOP and revert per g7-ea1_n9. - Context exhaustion at any clean breakpoint (post-3.5 dep-install close; post-3.7 smoke-test close; post-3.8 docs-absence-verify close) -> emit Stage-3-mid-stage-handoff XML (docs-only commit; ONE file in diff) per i1-4 + g6-ea6_n4 + g7-ea1_n8 + r5. NO partial-refactor commits. - Any procedural defect discovered in Stage 3 XML (e.g., regex/path drift) -> STOP and report; do NOT inline-fix without LA authorization (per dn3-equivalent).
Standing invariants unchanged through Stage 3: single substantive Stage 3 commit on devplatform main at item 3.9 only (parent 3894221); fleet stays paused (NEVER state.resume_fleet -- AttributeError); no merge to main (BlarAI or otherwise during Stage 3); stash@{0} untouched (12+-cycle byte-identity preservation continuing); STATUS append-only at item 3.10. Standing reminders r1-r5 + 9 g7-ea1 acks (n1-n10 with new n10 above) apply throughout.
After Item 3.10 + 3.10.v2 land, EA-1 emits the closing handoff to LA per the `closing_handoff_to_la_at_stage_3_close` block in the EA-1 init pointer. The closing handoff transitions Stage 3 to CLOSED and primes Stage 4 spawn (which requires LA panic- card preparation per ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md §8 self-test + Guide-#7-to-Guide-#8 handoff or Guide-#7 continuation per p17 strategic context-budget pattern).
guide_review_response.next_action_for_la:
Forward this Guide-#7 verdict file to the EA-1 chat. Specifically:
File path: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_STAGE3_EA_1.xml
Suggested chat message to EA-1: "Iter-1 gate APPROVED per Guide-#7 verdict at the attached file path. OQ-1 dispositioned as STATUS-staleness rule 5b(a); 3894221 is your new baseline. OQ-2 dispositioned as benign untracked (I will commit init pointer + your iter-1 gate + Guide-#7 verdict together as a single docs-only commit before you begin Item 3.1; standby briefly). OQ-3 affirmed (38 v4-era count, default disposition correct). OQ-4 informational, no action. New ack g7-ea1_n10 added: STATUS.md devplatform-HEAD line correction at 3.10. Standing reminders r1-r5 apply. Acknowledge in your next chat reply, then begin Item 3.1 (Copy-Item -Recurse for 7 dirs + 2 chokepoint helpers) per init pointer work_plan_pointer."
Optional pre-PROCEED action (recommended): commit the 3 docs-only files together. Suggested command (LA runs in BlarAI workspace terminal): cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-RESPONSE-EA_COMPREHENSION_GATE_ITERATION_1_STAGE3_INSTANCE_1.xml git add docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_STAGE3_EA_1.xml git commit -m "docs(platform_separation): Stage 3 init pointer + EA-1 iter-1 gate + Guide-#7 verdict (APPROVED)"
Then EA-1 acknowledges + begins Item 3.1.
